title: EEEAB's Mobs: Custom Bossbars
description: This addon for EEEAB's Mobs, adds custom bossbars for bosses
body:
This addon for EEEAB's Mobs, adds custom bossbars for EEEAB's mobs bosses

Nameless Guardian Bossbar

Immortal Bossbar
